debug_info.goal:

χ ξ : Formula ℕ
T : LO.Propositional.FTheory L
hT : χ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
inst✝ : Entailment.F L
⊢ ∀ (φ ψ : Formula ℕ),
    φ ➝ ψ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T →
      φ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT →
        ψ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT

intro φ ψ hφψ hφ
  simp only [construction_omega, Set.mem_iUnion] at hφ ⊢
  obtain ⟨i, hi⟩ := hφ
  use encode ψ
  simp [construction]
  split_ifs with h
  · tauto
  · exfalso
    push_neg at h
    obtain ⟨Γ, hΓ, hΓ₂⟩ := h
    have hΓ₁ : Γ.conj ➝ (Γ.conj ⋏ φ) ∈ T.theory := by
      apply T.L_subset
      apply Logic.iff_provable.mp
      apply CK_of_C_of_C
      · exact impId
      · apply af
        exact Logic.iff_provable.mpr (by tauto)
    have : (Γ.conj ⋏ φ) ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory := T.imp_closed axiomI (T.andIR (T.imp_closed hφψ hΓ₁) hΓ₂)
    have : Γ.conj ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory := T.imp_closed axiomI (T.andIR hΓ₁ this)
    have : ξ ∈ construction_omega T hT := by
      apply mem_omega_of_mem
      exact this
    exact construction_omega_not_mem_csq this
